hook: Initiative is attractive when it creates clarity, not when it tries to control the outcome.
body: Leading well in dating usually means making the next step easier to understand, not harder to refuse.

hook: Some men hear that they should lead and turn it into pressure, force, or over-certainty.
body: Strong initiative is specific, calm, and roomy enough for the other person to choose freely.

hook: Strong initiative is specific, calm, and roomy enough for the other person to choose freely.
body: A clear date suggestion with details is leadership. Repeatedly pushing after hesitation is not.

body: Make your next invitation more readable, not more intense.
